page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: HIST492, WMST456 or WGSS456. Formerly: WMST456.

WGSS457 Redefining Gender in the U.S., 1880-1935 (3 Credits) Exploring changing perceptions of gender in the U.S., 1880-1935, and the impact of those changes on the day to day lives of men and women. Credit Only Granted for. WGSS457 or WMST457.
